Home.receiptsTracked: {count, plural, one {# receipt} other {# receipts}} tracked
Home.takePhoto: Take a photo of your receipt
Home.snapFirstReceipt: Snap your first receipt to get started

ReceiptDetail.securityNote: Receipt data encrypted in transit and at rest.
ReceiptDetail.blurryBody: The AI couldn't read this receipt clearly. Please resnap it.

Camera.errorNotAllowed: Camera access is required to snap receipts. Allow camera in your browser settings.
Camera.errorNotReadable: Camera is in use by another app

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.exportFailedAfterPayment: Export failed after payment. Try Export Again.

Privacy.title: Privacy & Data
Privacy.dataStorageLabel: Processed and stored in the United States. See Privacy Policy for international transfers.
Privacy.deleteWarningBody: This will permanently delete all your receipts and account data. This cannot be undone.

Auth.signInToSync: Sign in to back up & sync
Auth.syncStep1: Sign in with Google on your other device
Auth.syncStep2: Open Snap1099 — your receipts sync automatically
Auth.softBody: Sign in to keep your data safe across devices.
Auth.hardExportBody: Google sign-in is required to generate your IRS Tax Pack.
Auth.hardSyncBody: Google sign-in is required to view receipts on all devices.

Paywall.body: Get your IRS-ready Excel export with categorized deductions, tax savings summary, and Schedule C line items.
Paywall.deviceWarning: If you switch phones without signing in with Google, your purchase cannot be restored.

Pwa.subtitle: Open like a native app — snap receipts one-handed on the job site
Pwa.manualHint: Tap ⋮ in Chrome, then Install app
Pwa.manualStepChromiumAndroid2: Tap "Install app" or "Add to Home screen".
Pwa.manualStepChromiumAndroid3: Confirm — Snap1099 opens from your home screen like a native app.
Pwa.manualStepChromiumDesktop1: Tap the ⋮ menu (top-right of Chrome or Edge).
Pwa.manualStepChromiumDesktop3: Confirm — Snap1099 opens in its own window.
Pwa.manualStepIosSafari1: Tap the Share button (square with arrow) at the bottom of Safari.
Pwa.manualStepIosSafari2: Scroll and tap "Add to Home Screen".
Pwa.manualStepIosSafari3: Tap "Add" — open Snap1099 from your home screen.
Pwa.manualStepMacosSafari1: Tap the Share button in Safari's toolbar.
Pwa.manualStepMacosSafari3: Snap1099 appears in your Dock like a native app.

Offline.title: You're offline
Offline.label: Offline
Offline.body: You can still snap receipts. They'll upload when you're back online.

Landing.logLine7: You're one photo away from tax savings.
Landing.privateSecureDesc: Encrypted sync when online. Local cache on device.

Legal.complianceFootnote: By snapping, you agree to our Terms & Privacy Policy. Online processing stores data in the United States.
Legal.privacyByDesignBody1: We minimize data collection for receipt categorization and tax-season exports under GDPR and CPRA.
Legal.privacyByDesignBody2: Offline: receipts stay on your device until you are back online.
Legal.privacyByDesignBody3: Online (including before Google Sign-In): we send receipt images to our U.S. servers and OpenAI to categorize your receipt. We do not collect your name or email until you sign in with Google.
Legal.dataStorageBody1: Receipt images and related data are stored on encrypted cloud servers in the United States.
Legal.dataStorageBody2: By using the App and agreeing to our Terms and Privacy Policy, you acknowledge that your data will be processed in the U.S., which may have different laws than your country.
Legal.dataStorageBody3: We use TLS 1.3 and AES-256 at rest where supported; our providers comply with the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework where applicable.
Legal.googleSignInBody: We request profile and email scopes only. We do not access Gmail, Drive, Photos, or Calendar.
Legal.subProcessorsBody: OpenAI (online receipt analysis, including before sign-in; no training on API data), Paddle, Google, Vercel/Neon/Blob (United States).
Legal.noSaleBody: Zero ads. We never sell or share your financial data with marketers or brokers.
Legal.yourRightsBody1: Access and export receipts in the App. Delete all data via Delete Account in Settings.
Legal.yourRightsBody2: Contact legal@snap1099.com — we aim to respond within 48 hours.
Legal.termsServiceBody: Snap1099 helps you photograph receipts, categorize expenses with AI, and export spreadsheets for tax prep. This is a tool, not tax or legal advice.
Legal.termsAccountsBody1: You may use the App with a Ghost ID before Google Sign-In. Online processing stores data in the United States as described in our Privacy Policy.
Legal.termsAccountsBody2: If you change devices without signing in, local data cannot be recovered.
Legal.termsPaymentsBody: Tax-season export uses Paddle one-time fees.
Legal.termsPrivacyBody: Use is governed by our Privacy Policy. By snapping a receipt while online, you agree to these Terms and the Privacy Policy, including U.S. processing.
Legal.termsDisclaimerBody1: The App is provided "as is" without warranties.

Errors.GOOGLE_LOGIN_REQUIRED: Sign in with Google to continue
Errors.INVALID_FILE_TYPE: Only JPEG and PNG are allowed
Errors.GHOST_RECEIPT_LIMIT: Too many receipts for unbound ghost
